title: Astro Events API Guide
wikitext:
= Astro Events API Guide = This page documents the structured API for querying astrological event data from the FusionGirl wiki. Designed for '''AI agent consumption'''. == Quick Start == All astrological transit events are stored in the '''AstroEvents''' [[Extension:Cargo|Cargo]] table and queryable via the MediaWiki API. === Base URL === 
https://wiki.fusiongirl.app/api.php?action=cargoquery&format=json
=== Example Queries === ==== All Conjunctions in 2026 ==== 
GET /api.php?action=cargoquery
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,sign1,sign2,interpretation
    &where=year=2026 AND aspect='Conjunction'
    &order_by=event_date
    &format=json
==== Jupiter transits (any aspect) ==== 
GET /api.php?action=cargoquery
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2
    &where=planet1='Jupiter' OR planet2='Jupiter'
    &order_by=event_date
    &format=json
==== Events in Scorpio ==== 
GET /api.php?action=cargoquery
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2
    &where=sign1='Scorpio' OR sign2='Scorpio'
    &order_by=event_date
    &format=json
==== Retrograde events ==== 
GET /api.php?action=cargoquery
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2
    &where=retrograde1='Yes' OR retrograde2='Yes'
    &order_by=event_date
    &format=json
==== Count events by aspect type ==== 
GET /api.php?action=cargoquery
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=aspect,COUNT(*)=count
    &group_by=aspect
    &order_by=count DESC
    &format=json
==== iCalendar export (subscribe in any calendar app) ==== 
GET /index.php?title=Special:CargoExport
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2,interpretation
    &order_by=event_date
    &format=icalendar
==== JSON export ==== 
GET /index.php?title=Special:CargoExport
    &tables=AstroEvents
    &fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2,interpretation
    &order_by=event_date
    &format=json
== Available Fields == {| class="wikitable" |- ! Field !! Type !! Description !! Example |- | event_date || Datetime || UTC datetime of exact aspect || 2026-03-08 03:42:00 |- | planet1 || String || First celestial body || Jupiter |- | planet2 || String || Second celestial body || Saturn |- | aspect || String || Aspect type || Conjunction |- | sign1 || String || Zodiac sign of planet1 || Aquarius |- | sign2 || String || Zodiac sign of planet2 || Scorpio |- | element1 || String || Element of sign1 || Air |- | element2 || String || Element of sign2 || Water |- | modality1 || String || Modality of sign1 || Fixed |- | modality2 || String || Modality of sign2 || Fixed |- | degree1 || Float || Ecliptic degree of planet1 || 311.43 |- | degree2 || Float || Ecliptic degree of planet2 || 221.43 |- | retrograde1 || Boolean || Planet1 retrograde || Yes/No |- | retrograde2 || Boolean || Planet2 retrograde || Yes/No |- | interpretation || Wikitext || Natural-language interpretation || Fusion of energies... |- | source_file || String || Source ICS file || planetary_aspect_events_2026.ics |- | year || Integer || Event year || 2026 |} == WHERE Clause Operators == Cargo supports standard SQL-like operators in the where parameter: * =, !=, <, >, <=, >= * LIKE '%pattern%' * IN ('val1','val2') * AND, OR * BETWEEN * IS NULL, IS NOT NULL == Rate Limits == The API has no authentication requirement for read-only queries. Please limit requests to a reasonable rate (≤1 req/sec for bulk operations). == Data Coverage == * '''Source:''' planetaryAspectEventsCalendar ICS files * '''Years:''' 2024–2033 (expandable to 2056) * '''Events:''' ~400+ events per year * '''Aspects:''' Conjunction, Opposition, Trine, Square, Sextile, Quincunx, and minor aspects == See Also == * [[Astro Events Calendar]] — interactive calendar view * [[Astrological Timeline 2025–2033]] — narrative timeline pages * [[Template:AstroEvent]] — Cargo schema definition [[Category:API Documentation]] [[Category:AI Agent Resources]] [[Category:FusionGirl Documentation]]

title: Astro Events Calendar
wikitext:
= Astro Events Calendar =
Interactive calendar of all astrological transit events from 2024 to 2033.

This data is sourced from the [[planetaryAspectEventsCalendar]] ICS files and stored in the
'''AstroEvents''' [[Extension:Cargo|Cargo]] table for structured AI-queryable access.

== Interactive Calendar ==
{{#cargo_query:
tables=AstroEvents
|fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect
|order by=event_date
|format=calendar
|calendar start date field=event_date
|calendar end date field=event_date
|color=aspect
}}

== Upcoming Major Transits ==
{{#cargo_query:
tables=AstroEvents
|fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2,interpretation
|where=event_date >= NOW() AND aspect IN ('Conjunction','Opposition','Trine','Square','Sextile')
|order by=event_date
|limit=25
|format=dynamic table
|column widths=120;80;80;100;80;80;300
}}

== Filter by Aspect ==
=== Conjunctions ===
{{#cargo_query:
tables=AstroEvents
|fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,sign1,sign2,interpretation
|where=aspect='Conjunction' AND event_date >= NOW()
|order by=event_date
|limit=15
|format=table
}}

=== Oppositions ===
{{#cargo_query:
tables=AstroEvents
|fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,sign1,sign2,interpretation
|where=aspect='Opposition' AND event_date >= NOW()
|order by=event_date
|limit=15
|format=table
}}

== By Year ==
{{#cargo_query:
tables=AstroEvents
|fields=year,COUNT(*)=count
|group by=year
|order by=year
|format=bar chart
|x axis label=Year
|y axis label=Events
}}

== ICS Export ==
Subscribe to the astrological events calendar feed:
* '''All events:''' [{{fullurl:Special:CargoExport|tables=AstroEvents&fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2,interpretation&order_by=event_date&format=icalendar}} iCalendar feed]
* '''Conjunctions only:''' [{{fullurl:Special:CargoExport|tables=AstroEvents&fields=event_date,planet1,planet2,aspect,sign1,sign2&where=aspect%3D%27Conjunction%27&order_by=event_date&format=icalendar}} iCalendar feed (Conjunctions)]

== See Also ==
* [[Astro Events API Guide]] — programmatic access for AI agents
* [[Astrological Timeline 2025–2033]] — narrative timeline pages
* [[Astrological Transit Reference 2025–2033]] — transit reference pages

= Astrological Transits 2025 (Raves Astrology) =
'''Raves Astrology''' interpretation of transits for '''2025'''.

''← [[2025|Back to 2025]]''

This page presents astrological transits through the '''Raves / Human Design''' lens, mapping cosmic cycles to individual and collective neutrino programming.

''For the full transit data, see [[Planetary Transits 2025]].''
''For the base year overview, see [[2025]].''

== Key Transits (Raves Astrology) ==
=== 2025-01-03: ♂ Mars ☍ ♇ Pluto — ♋ Cancer / ♑ Capricorn ===
This is a deeply emotional and intuitive time. This period brings practical and grounded energy. This period promotes new beginnings and action. This period promotes new beginnings and action. Cancer nurtures, encouraging emotional security and care. Capricorn disciplines, promoting ambition, responsibility, and endurance. Mars signifies action, energy, passion, and assertiveness. Pluto signifies transformation, power, and rebirth. An Opposition (☍) highlights tension, contrast, and opportunities for balance. Emotions find grounding and stability in practical matters. Two initiators collide, sparking new beginnings but potential clashes. The interaction between passion and transformation delves into themes of power and depth.

=== 2025-01-04: ☉ Sun ⚹ ♄ Saturn — ♐ Sagittarius / ♒ Aquarius ===
This time ignites passion and bold action. This phase emphasizes intellect and communication. This phase supports adaptability and change. This is a time for determination and staying the course. Sagittarius expands, fostering optimism, exploration, and wisdom. Aquarius innovates, encouraging uniqueness, rebellion, and new ideas. The Sun represents the core self, vitality, and life purpose. Saturn represents discipline, structure, responsibility, and karma. A Sextile (⚹) facilitates opportunities and collaboration with some effort. Passion and intellect combine, fostering creative ideas. Persistence meets adaptability, encouraging steady progress with flexibility. The bond between vitality and discipline addresses structure and limitations.

=== 2025-01-06: ♇ Pluto ⚹ Node Node — ♑ Capricorn / ♓ Pisces ===
This period brings practical and grounded energy. This is a deeply emotional and intuitive time. This period promotes new beginnings and action. This phase supports adaptability and change. Capricorn disciplines, promoting ambition, responsibility, and endurance. Pisces softens the body, enhancing compassion, dreams, and spiritual connections. Pluto signifies transformation, power, and rebirth. The North Node represents destiny and life purpose. A Sextile (⚹) facilitates opportunities and collaboration with some effort. = Astrological Transits 2026 (Business Astrology) =
'''Business Astrology''' interpretation of transits for '''2026'''.

''← [[2026|Back to 2026]]''

This page presents astrological transits through a '''business and market analysis''' lens, mapping cosmic cycles to economic patterns, organizational dynamics, and strategic timing.

''For the full transit data, see [[Planetary Transits 2026]].''
''For the base year overview, see [[2026]].''

== Key Transits (Business Astrology) ==
=== 2026-01-01: ☿ Mercury □ ♆ Neptune — ♐ Sagittarius / ♓ Pisces ===
[High Risk] Operational friction exposes vulnerable chokepoints.
Why it matters: Bottlenecks force trade-offs that invite delivery delays and cost overruns.
Action: Program management: trigger the contingency squad, reprioritise backlog, and reset SLAs within 24 hours.
Watch: Monitor incident volume and backlog burn\; escalate if slippage tops 10%.

Interaction Insight: Filter visionary spin through rigorous fact-checks to keep trust high.

=== 2026-01-09: ♀ Venus ☍ ♃ Jupiter ℞ — ♑ Capricorn / ♋ Cancer ===
[High Risk] Competing agendas split the strategy narrative.
Why it matters: Stakeholders hear mixed guidance, spiking volatility in sentiment and policy commitments.
Action: Strategy lead: convene an alignment war room, publish a reconciled brief, and hedge exposures immediately.
Watch: Monitor media and analyst sentiment\; flag if net score stays negative for two sessions.

Interaction Insight: Leverage goodwill to expand partnerships but validate return profiles before scaling.

= Astrological Transits 2026 (Space Force Astrology) =
'''Space Force Astrology''' interpretation of transits for '''2026'''.

''← [[2026|Back to 2026]]''

This page presents astrological transits through a '''Space Force operational''' lens, mapping cosmic cycles to defense readiness, space domain awareness, and operational timing.

''For the full transit data, see [[Planetary Transits 2026]].''
''For the base year overview, see [[2026]].''

== Key Transits (Space Force Astrology) ==
=== 2026-01-01: ☿ Mercury □ ♆ Neptune — ♐ Sagittarius / ♓ Pisces ===
[High Risk] Friction between crews exposes threat surfacegaps.
Why it matters: Conflicting tactics strain bandwidth and risk sensor blind spots.
Action: Deploy a tiger team to map chokepoints, rebalance duties, and publish a revised battle rhythm within 24 hours.
Watch: Watch for packet loss or telemetry drops around contested nodes.

Interaction Insight: Balance intel routing with perception ops to keep the missionrhythm steady.

=== 2026-01-09: ♀ Venus ☍ ♃ Jupiter ℞ — ♑ Capricorn / ♋ Cancer ===
[High Risk] Countervailing agendas split the ops floor.
Why it matters: Mixed guidance threatens readiness and forces crews to guess intent, slowing sorties.
Action: Stand up an alignment huddlethis watch, assign adjudication authority, and freeze non-critical tasks.
Watch: Track crew chatter and escalation volume for sustained turbulence.

Interaction Insight: Capitalize on coalition goodwill to extend strategic reach without overextending sustainment.

=== 2026-01-10: ☉ Sun ☍ ♃ Jupiter ℞ — ♑ Capricorn / ♋ Cancer ===
[High Risk] Countervailing agendas split the ops floor.
Why it matters: Mixed guidance threatens readiness and forces crews to guess intent, slowing sorties.
Action: Stand up an alignment huddle this watch, assign adjudication authority, and freeze non-critical tasks.
Watch: Track crew chatter and escalation volume for sustained turbulence.

Interaction Insight: Balance command authority with strategic reach to keep the mission rhythm steady.

=== 2026-01-14: ☿ Mercury ☍ ♃ Jupiter ℞ — ♑ Capricorn / ♋ Cancer ===
[High Risk] Countervailing agendas split the ops floor.
Why it matters: Mixed guidance threatens readiness and forces crews to guess intent, slowing sorties.
Action: Stand up an alignment huddle this watch, assign adjudication authority, and freeze non-critical tasks.
Watch: Track crew chatter and escalation volume for sustained turbulence.

Interaction Insight: Balance intel routing with strategic reach to keep the mission rhythm steady.

=== 2026-01-15: ♀ Venus ⚹ ♄ Saturn — ♑ Capricorn / ♓ Pisces ===
[Opportunity] Targeted alliances unlock fast assists.
Why it matters: Allied assets are willing to share bandwidth or ISR for limited windows.
Action: Task liaison officers to broker a 72-hour support package and capture metrics for follow-on agreements.
Watch: Monitor coalition comms windows for slippage.
